rect.style: stroke: none; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(25, 118, 210); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0px;

polygon.style: stroke: none; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0px;

path.style: stroke: none; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0px;
